name: kitakita
description: KitaKita - AI vision assistant for visually impaired users (Android via Capacitor)

scripts.android:open: next build && cap sync && cap open android
scripts.android:apk: next build && cap sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:build: next build && cap sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:run: npm run android:build && npm run android:install && adb shell am start -n com.kitakita.app/.MainActivity
